title: tilia caucasica
intro: Tilia caucasica, also known as Caucasian linden or small-leaved lime, is a deciduous tree native to the Caucasus region. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Tilia caucasica include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and soothing respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Tilia caucasica is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies for its calming and relaxing effects.
